Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Fixfest is a global gathering of repairers, tinkerers, and activists 92 upvotes, 8 comments
  2. An opinionated take on how to do important research that matters 27 upvotes, 1 comments
  3. Algebraic topology: knots links and braids 41 upvotes, 3 comments
  4. Building a Procedural Hex Map with Wave Function Collapse 144 upvotes, 28 comments
  5. JSLinux Now Supports x86_64 90 upvotes, 17 comments
  6. Fontcrafter: Turn Your Handwriting into a Real Font 355 upvotes, 116 comments
  7. Show HN: The Mog Programming Language 36 upvotes, 9 comments
  8. Rethinking Syntax: Binding by Adjacency 15 upvotes, 2 comments
  9. FreeBSD Capsicum vs. Linux Seccomp Process Sandboxing 87 upvotes, 31 comments
  10. Reverse-engineering the UniFi inform protocol 116 upvotes, 45 comments
  11. Segagaga Has Been Translated into English 87 upvotes, 32 comments
  12. FFmpeg at Meta: Media Processing at Scale 182 upvotes, 80 comments
  13. Workers report watching Ray-Ban Meta-shot footage of people using the bathroom 16 upvotes, 3 comments
  14. Flash media longevity testing – 6 years later 89 upvotes, 40 comments
  15. Restoring a Sun SPARCstation IPX part 1: PSU and NVRAM (2020) 65 upvotes, 28 comments
  16. Ireland shuts last coal plant, becomes 15th coal-free country in Europe (2025) 712 upvotes, 429 comments
  17. Show HN: VS Code Agent Kanban: Task Management for the AI-Assisted Developer 80 upvotes, 38 comments
  18. The Window Chrome of Our Discontent 129 upvotes, 72 comments
  19. Jolla on track to ship new phone with Sailfish OS, user-replaceable battery 114 upvotes, 68 comments
  20. What I Always Wanted to Know about Second Class Values 16 upvotes, 5 comments
  21. Launch HN: Terminal Use (YC W26) – Vercel for filesystem-based agents 41 upvotes, 21 comments
  22. US Court of Appeals: TOS may be updated by email, use can imply consent [pdf] 483 upvotes, 374 comments
  23. Bluesky CEO Jay Graber is stepping down 9 upvotes, 2 comments
  24. Unlocking Python's Cores:Energy Implications of Removing the GIL 103 upvotes, 74 comments
  25. Is legal the same as legitimate: AI reimplementation and the erosion of copyleft 135 upvotes, 133 comments
  26. DARPA's new X-76 Experimental Plane 54 upvotes, 53 comments
  27. Show HN: DenchClaw – Local CRM on Top of OpenClaw 43 upvotes, 41 comments
  28. The optimal age to freeze eggs is 19 38 upvotes, 37 comments
  29. Grammarly is offering ‘expert’ AI reviews from famous dead and living writers 105 upvotes, 130 comments
  30. Florida judge rules red light camera tickets are unconstitutional 85 upvotes, 150 comments

Last generated 3:30am, 10 March 2026. Source here.
